options.name: -level
options.description: Reports paths for specified glitch level. Allowed values are: VL, VH, worst, or all

options.name: -max_paths
options.description: Reports the specified no of paths

options.name: -max_slack
options.description: Reports paths with glitch slack equal to or lesser than specified value

options.name: -nets
options.description: Reports paths with endpoint being all the input pins connected to this net

options.name: -nworst
options.description: Max no. of sources per endpoint for which paths need to be reported

options.name: -pins
options.description: Reports the paths for specified endpoint pins

options.name: -source_depth
options.description: Max number of sources to be traced in any given branch in the fanin cone of violation

options.name: -views
options.description: Reports the paths for the specified view (string, optional) > <filename> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename> # Append to output file
